creator: lazeraman@gmail.com
text:
The make_mo only needs to be run if using the github code directly, which does not have the files pre-built.

make_mo.py doesn't need to be run if the SABnzbd-*-src.tar.gz file is used, so I think that you are correct, and that step can be removed.

Likely the person who added this line did so based of the instructions from https://sabnzbd.org/wiki/installation/install-off-modules, not realizing that the file they were sourcing has the files already created.
